title: Filter option in "My work"
excerpt: Is there a way to add functionality to filter on my work on status or priority so its more dynamic and you can view just “high” priority items or only items that are “in progresss”

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add functionality to filter on my work on status or priority so its more dynamic and you can view just “high” priority items or only items that are “in progresss”

My work issues1875×902 223 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rich,

This currently isn’t supported, I apologise for the inconvenience! Please submit this as a feature request so our community members can upvote your request The more votes the better!

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml:
